questions.question:
A variable \( \text{p} \) is said to be line at point \( \text{m} \) if and only if \( : \)



Compiler Design: NIELIT 2021 Dec Scientist B
options: Value of \( \text{p} \) at \( \text{m} \) would be used along some path in the flow graph starting at point \( \text{m} \)
Value of \( \text{p} \) at \( \text{m} \) would be used along some path in the flow graph ending at point \( \text{m} \)
questions.correct_answer: Value of \( \text{p} \) at \( \text{m} \) would be used along some path in the flow graph starting at point \( \text{m} \)
